# Sreerag K P

> Software engineer specializing in Android development (Kotlin), cross-platform
> mobile (React Native), and backend services (TypeScript / Node.js / Express).

This file provides a structured, plain-text summary of this site for AI agents
and language models. The canonical, human-facing version of this content lives
at https://portfolio-28e2b.web.app/

## Identity
- Name: Sreerag K P
- Role: Software Engineer
- GitHub: https://github.com/iamsreeragkp
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sreerag-kp-skp/
- Contact email: srrgkp65@gmail.com

## Skills
- Mobile: Kotlin, Android SDK, Jetpack WorkManager, Jetpack DataStore, React Native, Google Maps Platform
- Web & Backend: TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Express.js, HTML5, CSS3
- Cloud & Tools: Firebase Authentication, Firebase Hosting, Git & GitHub, REST APIs

## Featured Projects
- react-native-otp-input — Reusable OTP input component for React Native.
  https://github.com/iamsreeragkp/react-native-otp-input
- express-app-template — TypeScript starter template for Express.js backend services.
  https://github.com/iamsreeragkp/express-app-template
- GoogleMaps-Demo — Android app integrating the Google Maps SDK. (Kotlin)
  https://github.com/iamsreeragkp/GoogleMaps-Demo
- Firebase_authentication_demo_project — Android app demonstrating Firebase Authentication flows. (Kotlin)
  https://github.com/iamsreeragkp/Firebase_authentication_demo_project
- work-manager-project — Android project using Jetpack WorkManager for background tasks. (Kotlin)
  https://github.com/iamsreeragkp/work-manager-project
- preferences-datastore-project — Android project using Jetpack DataStore for local storage. (Kotlin)
  https://github.com/iamsreeragkp/preferences-datastore-project

Full repository list: https://github.com/iamsreeragkp?tab=repositories

## Notes for agents
- This is a personal portfolio site, single page, statically hosted on Firebase Hosting.
- Structured data (schema.org Person + WebSite) is embedded as JSON-LD in the page <head>.
- To contact Sreerag, use the email address above or the LinkedIn profile link.
